opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every time I stand up, the room goes completely black, my legs feel like jelly, and I have to sit back down instantly before I pass out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe dizziness and near-fainting on standing over the last two days, causing a minor collapse back onto the bed earlier today.

symptom_narrative.duration: two days of dizziness and visual darkening immediately on standing, each lasting seconds until he sits
symptom_narrative.character: lightheadedness with the room going black and legs feeling like jelly on standing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: bad enough that he nearly passed out and had a minor collapse back onto the bed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: whole-body lightheadedness on standing; a dull ache across the neck/shoulders after standing
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: strictly on standing from sitting or lying; settles immediately on sitting/lying down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting or lying down relieves it immediately
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a 'coat-hanger' ache across the neck and shoulders after standing, and generalised weakness; denies chest pain, palpitations, or the room spinning
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: new over the last couple of days
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: restricted to bed/chair from fear of falling

past_medical_history.how_managed: takes tamsulosin, recently increased in dose

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; cluttered walkways and loose rugs at home increase fall risk

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: frightened of falling and losing independence living alone

objective_data_offered.value: about 135/80 sitting, dropping to ~105/65 on standing (home cuff)
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-measured on a home cuff; a clinician active-stand test is needed to confirm
